desc: The Clans unite to free ShadowClan, the lost SkyClan returns, and Darktail meets his end in the river.
descZh: 各族联合起来解放影族，失落的天族归来，暗尾也在河水中迎来了终结。

q.en: To free ShadowClan, the other Clans unite to fight ___ .
q.zh: 为了解放影族，其他族群联合起来对抗___。

options.zh: 暗尾与亲族（Darktail and the Kin）

options.en: the Dark Forest according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 黑森林（the Dark Forest）（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: The four Clans join forces to drive Darktail and his Kin out of ShadowClan.
explain.zh: 四大族群联手，要把暗尾和他的亲族赶出影族。

q.en: Which long-lost Clan returns to the lake to help in the battle?
q.zh: 哪一支失落已久的族群回到湖畔，前来助战？

options.zh: 奔流部落（The Tribe of Rushing Water）

explain.en: SkyClan, led by Leafstar and warriors like Hawkwing, arrives at the lake just in time to help.
explain.zh: 由叶星（Leafstar）和鹰翅（Hawkwing）等武士带领的天族，恰好在此时抵达湖畔相助。

q.en: SkyClan is led by its leader, whose name is ___ .
q.zh: 天族由其族长带领，这位族长名叫___。

options.en: Hawkwing according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 鹰翅（Hawkwing）（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: Leafstar is the leader of SkyClan, the cat who guides her Clan back to the lake territories.
explain.zh: 叶星（Leafstar）是天族的族长，正是她带领族群回到湖畔领地。

q.en: Needletail, who once followed Darktail, dies by ___ to help the Clans.
q.zh: 曾经追随暗尾的针尾，为了帮助各族，___而死。

options.en: a battle wound according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 战伤（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: Needletail drowns in the river while trying to escape Darktail and protect the Clans she betrayed.
explain.zh: 针尾为了逃离暗尾、保护她曾经背叛的族群，在河中溺亡，牺牲了自己。

q.en: Darktail is finally defeated when he ___ .
q.zh: 暗尾最终被击败，是因为他___。

options.zh: 在河中溺亡（drowns in the river）

options.en: is exiled to the mountains according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 被流放到山区（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: During the battle, Darktail is swept into the river and drowns, ending his cruel rule.
explain.zh: 战斗中，暗尾被冲进河里溺亡，他残酷的统治就此终结。

q.en: After the Kin is driven out, who leads ShadowClan again?
q.zh: 亲族被赶走后，谁重新领导影族？

explain.en: Rowanstar and the exiled ShadowClan cats return home and take back their Clan.
explain.zh: 罗星（Rowanstar）和流亡的影族猫回到家园，重新接管了自己的族群。

q.en: Twigpaw and Violetpaw discover they are ___ .
q.zh: 小枝爪和小紫爪发现她们其实是___。

options.en: strangers according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 陌生人（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: Though raised apart in different Clans, Twigpaw and Violetpaw are littermate sisters.
explain.zh: 虽然在不同族群长大，小枝爪和小紫爪其实是同一窝的亲姐妹。

q.en: The Clans needed SkyClan so that all ___ Clans would stand at the lake.
q.zh: 各族需要天族，这样湖畔才会有完整的___个族群。

explain.en: Long ago SkyClan was the fifth Clan at the lake; bringing them back makes the five Clans whole.
explain.zh: 很久以前天族是湖畔的第五支族群；让它归来，五族才得以完整。

q.en: Alderheart uses his skills as a ___ to help the wounded after the battle.
q.zh: 战后，赤杨心以___的身份救治伤者。

options.en: warrior according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 武士（warrior）（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: As ThunderClan's medicine cat, Alderheart heals the cats hurt in the fight against the Kin.
explain.zh: 作为雷族的巫医，赤杨心救治了在与亲族之战中受伤的猫。

q.en: SkyClan is brought to the lake largely thanks to the brave warrior ___ .
q.zh: 天族能回到湖畔，很大程度上要归功于勇敢的武士___。

explain.en: Hawkwing leads SkyClan on the long journey back to the lake and fights beside the other Clans.
explain.zh: 鹰翅（Hawkwing）带领天族踏上返回湖畔的漫长旅程，并与其他族群并肩作战。
